{{Quote|I've never understood why so many of you new riders make your first competitive start in the biggest race of the year.|Anglu to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] before his first race|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Anglu''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Hidden Beks]]. They attended the [[Tarisian Season Opener]] and talked to the former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] there. They fled shortly thereafter when a fight broke out between [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkar]] leader [[Brejik]] and Revan.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You didn't look too bad out there, rookie. I'm not saying you looked good, mind you... only that you didn't look bad.|Anglu to Revan|<ref name="kotor" />}}
Anglu was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who operated as a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] [[Hidden Beks]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="kotor" /> in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', which includes Anglu's appearance, in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> During 3956 BBY, they attended the [[Tarisian Season Opener]] in which then amnesiac former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] competed against the Black Vulkar [[Black Vulkars/Legends|swoop pilot]] [[Redros]] for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bastila Shan]] as a prize.<ref name="kotor" />

{{Gamemechanics}}

During the Season opener, Revan talked to Anglu, with them admitting to not understanding why new [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] riders make their starts in the biggest races of the year. Anglu then told Revan about his swoops chance to explode due to the [[Prototype accelerator|prototype swoop accelerator]] installed on it.<ref name="kotor" />

{{Endgame}}

After Revan won the swoop race, Black Vulkar leader [[Brejik]] accused Revan of cheating in the race. Cutting Brejik's boasting short, Shan was able to escape from the cage she was kept in and defeated the guard near her. Brejik called for Shan and Revan to killed and Anglu fled shortly thereafter.<ref name="kotor" />

==Personality and traits==
Anglu had [[Color/Legends|blue]]-[[Eye/Legends|eye]]<nowiki/>s and orange skin. Anglu found racers making their competitive start in the Tarisian Season Opener confusing.<ref name="kotor" />

==Equipment==
Anglu wore a [[Krath Holy Battle Suit]] and a grey headdress.<ref name="kotor" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|You don't stand a chance against the more experienced riders. But if the Vulkars want to throw away one of their entries on you, that's fine by me.|Anglu to Revan if the player sides with the Black Vulkars|<ref name="kotor" />}}
Anglu first appeared in the [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. If the player chooses to side with the Black Vulkars and race for them, Anglu will be the Hidden Beks racer and claim that the player does not stand a chance with the experienced racers. When racing, Anglu will beat the players first attempt with a time of 0:38:43.<ref name="kotor" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
